feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Are v3 (MCEX_UPDATE_*) jobs still required if all LIS datasources were converted to ODP?
entry.content:
I asked this from MS Copilot, and it said it is no longer required.  But looking at SAP Community posts, they say it is required.   Does anyone have an SAP note or documentation saying that v3 (MCEX_UPDATE_*) jobs are no longer required if all LIS datasources were converted to ODP?  BTW, this is for an up-to-date S/4HANA on-premise system and BW 7.5 HANA on-premise system.

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: Make Custom Field read-only that is added using Custom Fields and Logic Fiori app (F1481)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We added a Custom Field in Fiori app Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document (F0843A) using Custom Field and Logic Fiori app (F1481) with Business Context Accounting: Coding Block (FINS_CODING_BLOCK) and enabled it for OData service's (MMIM_GR4PO_DL_SRV ) Item entity, GR4PO_DL_Item. Now, we want to set this field to Read-only but we are not able to find correct way to set it.

We noticed that when we created this custom field, another custom field was also created in the background of type CFD_CUSTOM_UI_FIELD_CONTROL for structure MMIM_GR4PO_DL_ITEM, which seems like a field for field properties control, but we are not sure how to use this or change the behaviour using this field. This additional field is not available/visible when we are writing logic in Custom Logic app (F6957), only the created custom field is shown.

Does anyone also faced this issue and can suggest how to proceed?

Best regards

Ankur

entry.title: Authorization activities before and after SAP S/4HANA On-Premise upgrade (SAP GUI only)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am working on an SAP S/4HANA On-Premise upgrade project (SAP S/4HANA 2021 to SAP S/4HANA 2023) and I am responsible for Authorization. I would like to ask for best practices and recommendations regarding authorization activities before and after the upgrade.

  • Before the S/4HANA upgrade, what authorization-related checks or preparation activities should be done?
  • After the S/4HANA upgrade, which authorization follow-on activities are mandatory?

Please help to advise

Thanks,
QuocDT5

entry.title: 12 characters limit on UserID in SU01
entry.content:
We are not able increase the 12 character limit on UserID created in SU01. it is not accepting UserID longer than 12 characters.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: FSV P&L statement in S/4 Hana
entry.content: Though we have activated cost of sales accounting in S/4 Hana, some postings have happened with blank functional areas. Can we map such transactions also in the P&L report - meaning our combination will be GL account XXXXXX, functional area BLANK, P&L item say COGS

entry.title: Fiori My Inbox: WITH_URL Annotation Always Shows URL Instead of Custom Text
entry.content:
Dear Community,

 

I am doing an enhancement in My Inbox app, where I want to add a url to a specific item row.  Here I am using two calculated fields, one to determine the text and another to determine the URL to be used. Now I have done the following in my CDS:

@Semantics.url: {

mimeType: 'url'

}

@ObjectModel.readOnly: true

@ObjectModel.virtualElementCalculatedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_REVIEWINVOICE'

@ObjectModel.virtualElement: true

cast (' ' as abap.char(1024) )

as WEBSITEURL,

@ui.lineItem: [ {

position: 14,

importance: #HIGH,

type: #WITH_URL,

label : 'Webside URL' ,

value: 'REVIEWINVOICE' , //what users sees

url: 'WEBSITEURL' //actual link

} ]

@Semantics.url: {

mimeType: 'url'

}

@ObjectModel.readOnly: true

@ObjectModel.virtualElementCalculatedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_REVIEWINVOICE'

@ObjectModel.virtualElement: true

cast( ' ' as abap.char(1024) ) as REVIEWINVOICE,

 

I am trying to display the virtual calculated text message REVIEWINVOICE and show the other virtual calculated URL WEBSITEURL when clicking. Problem is the value and the text seem to overwrite each other somehow. The URL loading seems to work only when i put WEBSITEURL in the value section.

Additionally if I comment the @Semantics.url for REVIEWINVOICE, I cannot click on the link anymore.

Any Ideas ideas what am I doing wrong here. I wanted to mention that in IF_SADL_EXIT_CALC_ELEMENT_READ~CALCULATE, I manage determine both the text REVIEWINVOICE and the URL for WEBSITEURL

Thanks and looking forward for any ideas on this topic.

entry.title: SNOTE tcode not accessible after implementing SAP Note 3093855
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am currently preparing for an upgrade to SAP S/4HANA 2023  and working on the Simplification Item Check
System current information : SAP_BASIS 756 SP04


Issue Description

To implement SAP Note 2502552 (required for the Simplification Item Check), I first implemented its prerequisite SAP Note 3093855 via transaction SNOTE.

However, after implementing SAP Note 3093855, transaction SNOTE is no longer accessible with Syntax error in program "SAPLSCWE" -  Type "CWB_T_NOTE_DWLD_HTML_RESP" is unknown.

Questions

  1. Are there any additional prerequisite notes or SP level requirements for this note?
  2. What is the recommended way to recover or fix SNOTE in this situation?
  3. Is there an alternative approach to proceed with the Simplification Item Check if SNOTE is not accessible?

    Thank you in advance for your support.

    Best regards,

entry.title: C_TADM_23 : SAP Certified S/4HANA System Administrator - follow up ?
entry.content: This certification is retired at end of january 2026. What is the next certification for that job role ?

entry.title: Mass change of Routing Counter
entry.content: We have a case where we have 1700+ material numbers assigned to a group/counter ex: 1/20 which was mistakenly deleted at the header overview level. With that being said, A new group and counter was created in which we'd like to mass reassign all material from 1/20 into the new routing ex: 1/60. Tried CEWB and CA85N with no luck. What and how is the best transaction and best way to mass change all material in a counter to a new counter? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: PR/PO deletion Flexible Workflow issue
entry.content:
Currently, the workflow is not triggered when a PR line item is deleted with flexible workflow in place. Additionally, if all PO line items are deleted, the workflow is not re-triggered with flexible workflow in place


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Upgrade Role in SAP S/4HANA On-Premise (SAP GUI only)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

- After upgrading SAP S/4HANA 2021 to SAP S/4HANA 2023, will the roles on the 3-System be upgraded automatically or manually?

- How do I get a list of obsolete T-codes / new T-codes / new authorization objects?

Please help to advise

Thanks,
QuocDT5

entry.title: Leveraging Joule Custom Skills in S/4HANA PCE: A Clean Core Approach for Sourcing & Procurement
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

As a consultant focused on RISE with SAP and Clean Core strategies, I’ve been exploring how Joule (SAP’s Generative AI) can transform the user experience within S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (PCE), specifically for Sourcing & Procurement.

Integrating a custom skill developed in SAP Build with the Fiori Launchpad (S/4HANA 2025) is more than just a technical milestone; it is a strategic shift. For those of us managing large-scale environments, this represents a powerful way to handle extensibility Side-by-Side on SAP BTP, keeping the core stable and upgrade-ready.

Key Insights from my recent implementation:

  1. Enhancing Procurement Efficiency: By leveraging custom skills, we can empower users to query complex contract details or PR/PO statuses through natural language, significantly reducing the volume of L1/L2 support tickets.

  2. Clean Core Alignment: Using SAP Build Actions to consume OData APIs ensures that we are following SAP Best Practices, avoiding legacy "Z" developments inside the S/4HANA core.

  3. The SAP Activate Connection: During the Run phase, Joule acts as a continuous enabler, helping users navigate business processes without leaving the Fiori environment.

I’d love to hear your thoughts: For those already working with Joule in S/4HANA 2025 PCE, how are you handling the governance of these custom skills? Are you prioritizing "Read-only" informational skills, or are you moving towards transactional "Write" scenarios (e.g., creating Purchase Requisitions) in production?

Looking forward to exchanging experiences on this AI journey!

#RISEwithSAP #S4HANA #SAPMM #CleanCore #Joule #SAPBuild #BTP #SourcingAndProcurement

entry.title: ALTER SYSTEM ADD STATEMENT HINTにおける「FOR <sql_statement>」の指定方法について
entry.content:
現在、現行環境と比較して新環境の処理時間が遅く、業務に支障が生じており、
新環境を本番稼働できない可能性があるという大きな課題があります。
 
このため、処理時間が遅いSQL文に対してHINT句を指定する方法について調査を行っています。
 
SAP Note DIGITS の「6. 文のヒントはどのように管理できますか。」にて、
以下のSQLコマンドの説明があることを確認しました。
ALTER SYSTEM ADD STATEMENT HINT ( <hints> ) [OVERRIDE] [COMMENT '<comment>'] FOR <sql_statement>
 
本コマンドについて、以下の２点をご教示いただけますでしょうか。
 
１．FOR <sql_statement> の <sql_statement> には、STATEMENT HASH ではなく、SQL文そのものを指定することは可能でしょうか。
 
２．（上記 1 において SQL文を指定可能な場合）
　　<sql_statement> に、以下の例のように % などのワイルドカードを指定することは可能でしょうか。
　　目的としては、1回のコマンドで複数のSQL文に対してHINT句を指定できるかを確認したいと考えています。
 
　　ALTER SYSTEM ADD STATEMENT HINT ( USE_HEX_PLAN ) FOR 'SELECT % FROM "Z_CDS_VIEW_A" WHERE %'
 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Exit or enhancement option for Tasklist Component Assignment
entry.content: We are currently investigating the feasibility of adding custom fields to the Component Assignments subscreen (Screen 3500) within the General Task List operation (Program SAPLCMDI). Preliminary analysis via transaction SMOD and searching for relevant BAdIs has not yielded a standard enhancement option for this specific screen. Could you please confirm if there is a supported SAP standard exit, Business Add-In, or enhancement spot available to facilitate this requirement without modification to the standard object?

entry.title: Obsolete Tcode/ new Tcode after upgrading SAP S/4HANA On-Premise (SAP GUI only)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

After upgrading SAP S/4HANA 2021 to SAP S/4HANA 2023:

- How do I get a list of obsolete T-codes / new T-codes / new authorization objects?

Please help to advise

Thanks,
QuocDT5

entry.title: Dynamic Control in Custom Flexible Workflow
entry.content: Hello everyone, I'm currently doing a custom Flexible Workflow that requires dynamic approver based on 3rd party API data. Are there any ways for customizing the User decisions/Activities using ABAP code in callback class?

entry.title: ‘Plant’ filed not available in step condition in Manage workflow for Lean Service app
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Could you please share the relevant SAP Note for implementing SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF and SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL in the Private Cloud for additional step conditions for Manage workflow for service entry sheet - Lean Service.

Regards,

Gaurav W

entry.title: Combined Chart Column & Line with different dimentions on s4 hana analytical report
entry.content:
Hi all, Im a developer, not a bi/bw expert

i've created a Cube and a Query on S4hana, after that i've created an analytical report with some graphics and it is working well. ( Using app manage KPI and Reports )

My requirement is to have a combined chart, Collum and Line, but the line is just to have the total, so different dimentions :

So Columns are PLANT/DATE. Line shoud be only DATE ( to display the total )

Currently when im creating the combined it displays Column and Line, but with same values

 

What i need is only 1 line with total. Is it possible to create such graphic on Analytical list page?

current graphic configuration

S4 Hana 2025 ( we dont have SAC )

entry.title: PPDS: On the detailed scheduling dashboard - Fixing Interval
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a scenario where users add the fixed intervals on the dashboard for 2 weeks.
i,e orders within the 2 week fixed interval cannot be rescheduled. 
However when they execute the process orders in s/4 hana with re-read master data or switch source of supply from the Dashboard (on the same line/resource), system is moving/re-scheduling these orders out of the fixing interval. Even if the order is Fixed/Firmed.

How can we switch source of supply without disturbing the existing schedule of the fixed order.

entry.title: S/4 Hana - Track on SO schedule line level both requested delivery date and committed delivery date
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am working for a Make to Order scenario project, my customer wants to trace in the sales order just for statistical purpose at schedule line level both  the initial requested delivery date of the customer and also the committed date (if the date requested by the customer is not feasible).

In the sales order there is not availability check and are not configured lead times; the Customer care should enter manually the requested delivery date for each sales order item (also eventually splitting quantity on different dates), then if after discussion with Planning the date is not feasible the Customer care will enter for each schedule line previously defined the committed date (the date on which the company commits to the customer to deliver the product).

There is any standard solution to satisfy this requirement? Otherwise I am thinking to add a new custom field "committed date" on schedule line tab of the sales order.

Thanks in advance for your help.
